# Vishnu Jillala — Portfolio

> Personal portfolio of Vishnu Jillala, an aspiring full stack software engineer specializing in React, TypeScript, and modern web technologies.

This site showcases projects, technical skills, certifications, education, and work experience, plus contact options for recruiters and collaborators.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, hero introduction, and quick links to projects, skills, and contact.
- [Portfolio](/portfolio): Detailed view of projects, technical skills, certifications, and work experience.

## Optional

- [Sign In](/auth): Authentication entry point for protected profile views.
